name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
This is a store bot — shop without leaving Telegram.

• Browse Products — categories and items
• View Cart — review and checkout
• My Orders — track payment and shipping
• Alerts — restock notifications (opt-in)
• Profile — name, email, shipping address
• Admin Panel — product and order management (token required)

Tap /start anytime to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
